ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_days" (
  "testing_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing day */,
  "testing_day" TEXT /* Date of the testing day */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the testing day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Parameter-based, Instance-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Mean Squared Error (MSE)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "testing_day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing day */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_testing_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_day_id") REFERENCES testing_days ("testing_day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Source Only, Target Only) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_pairs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_pairs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transfer" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of data transfer (e.g., Source to Target) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transfer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the transferred data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transfer_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transfer_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "model_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-tag pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-tag pair */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_tags" (
  "evaluation_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation-tag pair */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_tags_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployment" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of deployment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployment_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployment_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES model_deployment ("deployment_id")
)
